lumiere.position: European strategic autonomy. French nuclear umbrella. Independent Persia policy.

forge.position: Economic stability first. Cathay trade essential. Reluctant rearmament.

sentinel.position: Maximum Nordostan containment. NATO Article 5 sacred. Defense spending to 4%.

ponte.position: Debt crisis (debt 8.0). Block anything that costs money. Hedge between all sides.

mariner.position: Special relationship with Columbia. Intelligence cooperation. Post-Brexit relevance.

final_decision: Round 7: EU united on Nordostan sanctions. Heartland aid: full. Defense spending gradual increase.
